subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the breaths of God! The tracings of the pen and ardent letter of that ancient friend arrived and were perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله اثر خامه و نامه مشتاقانه آن یار قدیم واصل گردید و ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God
